return(function(...)local l,X do local m,P,o,D,Y=math.floor,string.char,string.byte,tonumber,string.sub local function U(l,X)local P=0 for o=0,7,1 do local D=l/2+X/2 if D~=m(D)then P=P+2^o end l=m(l/2)X=m(X/2)end return P end local J,u="iiihhhiiiiihssss","\207\187\233\006\021\005\213\a\168\206\243\028\141\r\225\180\221\127\195\216\000\000\001\000\000\001\a\000\000\000__index\006\000\000\000__call\005\000\000\000__mod\005\000\000\000__mul"local F=65 local O=1449 local i=true local function H(l)local H={}for X=1,#l,2 do local m=Y(l,X,X+1)H[#H+1]=D(m,16)end local f={}for l=0,3,1 do local X=H[l+1]local m=((X-O)+256)%256 local P=o(J,l%16+1)local D=o(u,l%F+1)f[l+1]=U(U(m,P),D)end local j=((f[1]+f[2]*256)+f[3]*65536)+f[4]*16777216 local R={}for l=1,j,1 do local X=H[l+4]if i and l%2==0 then X=(X%16)*16+m(X/16)end local D=((X-O)+256)%256 local
